caption: In a studio setting filled with framed photos and equipment, a man wearing a white button-down shirt and a distinctive, tall, gray stylized wig is seated. He wears glasses and has a watch on his left wrist. Throughout the sequence, the man is adjusting his black over-ear headphones, moving his hands from his temples toward the top of the headphones. A professional microphone on a boom arm is positioned in front of him. To the left and right of the man, on-screen graphics are visible; one reads "BOSS TALK 101 PODCAST" with a microphone icon, and another smaller logo says "BOSS TALK 101". The background features a wall decorated with multiple small framed pictures and a clothing rack. The action is subtle, showing the man focusing on fitting his headphones comfortably as he prepares for a recording.
